content.json:
# MDE Response Audit

Action Center history with approvers, comments, and time-to-action metrics.

content.title: Primary view
content.query: MDE_ActionCenter_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(30d) | extend ActionType = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).actionType), Status = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).status), Approver = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).approverUpn) | summarize Count = count() by ActionType, Status | render barchart

content.title: Drift / trend
content.query: MDE_ActionCenter_CL | where TimeGenerated > ago(7d) | extend ActionType = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).actionType), Status = tostring(parse_json(RawJson).status), Created = todatetime(parse_json(RawJson).creationDateTimeUtc), Completed = todatetime(parse_json(RawJson).completionDateTimeUtc) | extend TimeToAction = datetime_diff("minute", Completed, Created) | project TimeGenerated, EntityId, ActionType, Status, TimeToAction
